feedback_rules: Verify popups in incognito: wait 30+ sec, scroll, exit-intent test
Test cart features with items in cart, never empty
Distinguish missing vs broken vs conditionally visible
Read exact SimilarWeb percentages, never estimate from bar charts
Use Lighthouse LAB data, not CrUX field data for scores
Verify proxy signals on-page: /collections/all for products, search Instagram variants
At least 60% of findings should be screenshot-only (Level 3)
Benchmark screenshots must show the EXACT feature recommended
Use client_screenshot=null placeholder when feature genuinely absent
Cart findings need cart screenshots, PDP needs PDP screenshots
For electronics: Star ratings is ambiguous — BEE vs review. Be specific.
For electronics: Spec comparison is critical — missing comparison tool is high priority
For electronics: EMI/BNPL calculator is STANDARD for high-AOV electronics
Create mockups when no competitor cleanly demonstrates a feature — prefer mockups over competitor screenshots for feature enhancements
Never approximate SimilarWeb numbers — read exact text percentages
